raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 5 will threaten the livelihoods of many independent contractors in California because it only covers certain industries.",
    "Senate Republicans proposed exemptions to AB 5 for various professions, including foresters, health care professionals, and single truck owner-operators.",
    "Senate Democrats blocked Senate Republicans' efforts to protect the employment status of independent contractors in those industries.",
    "The passage of AB 5 has created discrepancies in support for independent contractors across different industries.",
    "Democrats, labor unions, and Governor Newsom have been accused of picking winners and losers with AB 5."
```
